title: oreocharis humilis
intro: Oreocharis humilis, also known as the small Oreocharis or dwarf Oreocharis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Oreocharis humilis include its ability to help treat fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In terms of herbal preparations, Oreocharis humilis can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that are often used to treat various health conditions.
